commands.description: Lists all enabled built-in and custom commands active in your channel.

bot.description: Shows information about the bot developer and a link to the BotOfTheSpecter website.

roadmap.description: Posts a link to the public Trello board showing upcoming features and development plans.

quote.description: Retrieves a random quote, or a specific one by number if provided.

rps.description: Play Rock-Paper-Scissors against Specter. Specter picks randomly — may the best hand win!

story.description: Kicks off a collaborative AI-generated story in chat. Each use continues the tale.

roulette.description: Spin the roulette wheel in chat for a random outcome.

songrequest.description: Adds a song to the Spotify queue. Accepts a song title, artist name, Spotify link, or YouTube link. Requires Spotify to be linked in the dashboard.
syntax: !songrequest Never Gonna Give You Up by Rick Astley

songqueue.description: Displays the current Spotify song request queue. Requires Spotify to be linked in the dashboard.

skipsong.description: Skips the currently playing song in the Spotify request queue.

watchtime.description: Shows how long you have been watching the current stream session.

stoptimer.description: Stops your currently active countdown timer before it ends.

checktimer.description: Shows how much time is remaining on your active countdown timer.

version.description: Displays the current running version of BotOfTheSpecter.

convert.description: Converts between currencies using live exchange rates, or between physical units such as length, weight, temperature, speed, and volume. For currency, prefix the amount with the currency symbol (e.g. $100). For units, pass the amount followed by the from and to unit names.

subathon.description: Manages a subathon countdown timer. Mods can start, stop, pause, resume, add time, or check the current status.

todo.description: Manages the stream to-do list. Tasks are public by default; add the word private to keep a task hidden from chat. The task description must be wrapped in quotes. Mod-only for add, edit, remove, and complete actions.

todolist.description: Posts the top 5 public to-do list tasks directly in chat.

kill.description: Simulates a fun in-chat kill action targeting a mentioned user.

points.description: Shows the current bot point balance for yourself or a mentioned user.

slots.description: Pulls the slot machine lever and displays a randomised result in chat.

timer.description: Starts a personal countdown timer. Defaults to 5 minutes if no duration is given. Specter will ping you in chat when time is up.

game.description: Shows the game or category the channel is currently streaming.

gamble.description: Gamble your bot points on coinflip, blackjack, or roulette. Specify the game type and a bet amount. For roulette, also choose red or black.

joke.description: Tells a random joke in chat.

ping.description: Checks Specter's connection to the internet and returns the response time.

weather.description: Fetches current weather conditions for a specified city or location.

time.description: Displays the current time in a given IANA timezone (e.g. America/New_York). Defaults to UTC if no timezone is provided.

song.description: Shows the currently playing song via Spotify (if linked) or Shazam (premium users only).

translate.description: Auto-detects the language of the provided text and translates it to English.
translate.syntax: !translate Hola, cómo estás todos en el chat!

cheerleader.description: Displays the user who has cheered the most bits in the channel of all time.

steam.description: Looks up the currently streamed game on Steam and posts its store details in chat.

schedule.description: Posts the channel's streaming schedule and upcoming events.

mybits.description: Shows your total bits cheered and recent cheer stats for this channel.

lurk.description: Marks you as lurking so the streamer knows you're watching silently in the background.

unlurk.description: Removes your lurk status and announces your return to chat.

lurking.description: Lets chat know you are still lurking.

lurklead.description: Shows the user who has spent the most total time lurking in the channel.

userslurking.description: Shows how many users are currently marked as lurking.

clip.description: Creates a clip of the last 30 seconds of the stream and posts the link in chat.

subscription.description: Shows your current Twitch subscription tier for this channel.

hug.description: Sends a virtual hug to a mentioned chatter.

highfive.description: Gives a virtual high-five to a mentioned chatter.

kiss.description: Sends a playful virtual kiss to a mentioned chatter.

uptime.description: Shows how long the stream has been live in the current session.

typo.description: Increments the typo counter for yourself or a mentioned user by one.

typos.description: Displays the total typo count for yourself or a mentioned user.

followage.description: Shows how long you or a mentioned user has been following the channel.

deaths.description: Shows the current in-game death count for the stream session.

heartrate.description: Displays the streamer's live heart rate. Requires a HypeRate code to be configured in the dashboard.

puzzles.description: Shows the current puzzle completion stats for the stream session.

addcommand.description: Creates a new custom command with the given name and response text.
addcommand.syntax: !addcommand hello Hello there, welcome to the stream!

removecommand.description: Permanently deletes a custom command from the bot.

editcommand.description: Updates the response text of an existing custom command.
editcommand.syntax: !editcommand hello Welcome to the best stream on Twitch!

enablecommand.description: Enables a disabled built-in or custom command so it responds in chat again.

disablecommand.description: Disables a built-in or custom command so it no longer responds in chat.

removetypos.description: Decreases the typo count for a mentioned user by the specified amount. Defaults to 1 if no amount is given.

addpoints.description: Awards a specified number of bot points to a mentioned user.

removepoints.description: Deducts a specified number of bot points from a mentioned user.

permit.description: Grants a user a temporary permission bypass for link posting or other restricted actions.

removequote.description: Permanently deletes a specific quote from the quote list by its number.

quoteadd.description: Adds a new quote to the channel's quote list.
quoteadd.syntax: !quoteadd Always be yourself, unless you can be a streamer.

settitle.description: Updates the stream title to the provided text.
settitle.syntax: !settitle Chilling with chat and playing Minecraft!

setgame.description: Changes the current stream category to the specified game or category name.

edittypos.description: Sets the typo count for a mentioned user to a specific number.

deathadd.description: Adds to the in-game death count. Defaults to +1 if no amount is given.

deathremove.description: Subtracts from the in-game death count to correct mistakes. Defaults to -1 if no amount is given.

shoutout.description: Sends a shoutout message in chat for a mentioned user, including their last played game.

marker.description: Places a named marker in the VOD at the current timestamp, useful for finding highlights later.

checkupdate.description: Checks whether a newer version of BotOfTheSpecter is available.

startlotto.description: Generates the winning lottery numbers to begin a lotto round. Viewers pick numbers with !slots.

drawlotto.description: Draws and announces lotto winners based on how closely their numbers match the winning set. Awards points by division.

wsstatus.description: Checks and reports the current WebSocket server connection status for this channel.

dbstatus.description: Checks and reports the database connection status and connection uptime.

forceonline.description: Manually sets the bot's internal stream status to online, bypassing the Twitch event. Use if the bot missed the stream going live.

forceoffline.description: Manually sets the bot's internal stream status to offline, bypassing the Twitch event. Use if the bot missed the stream ending.

obs.description: Triggers an OBS event via the BotOfTheSpecter OBS Connector app. Can also switch to a named scene.

createraffle.description: Creates and schedules a new raffle with a name, prize, and number of winners. Add weighted to give subscribers and VIPs better odds. Start it when ready with !startraffle.

startraffle.description: Starts the next scheduled raffle, or a specific one by ID. Viewers can then enter with !joinraffle.

joinraffle.description: Enters you into the currently running raffle.

leaveraffle.description: Removes you from the currently running raffle.

stopraffle.description: Ends the active raffle immediately without drawing any winners.

drawraffle.description: Draws and announces the raffle winner(s) from all current entries. Optionally specify a raffle ID to draw a specific one.
